titleStmt.title: SII 8.459: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 459. (A.R. No. 164 of 1903). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḷ ṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷa puṇara Urimaiyiṟ[ ciṟan=ta] maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉa luṟṟiḻitara tikkaṉaittum tan cakkara naṭātti vicaiyaviṣekam paṇṇi virasiṁ- hāsaṉattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi marāṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattunālāvatu rājarāja ppāṇṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup parāntakavaḷanāṭṭu coḷentiraciṅka timaṅkalattu śrīpuṇṭavatdha nattu vatsagotra ttu kūttaṉ comanātaṉeṉ Ivūr tirumeṟkoyil
Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya ḷvāṟku vaicca tirunun=tā viḷakku Oṉṟukku nittam Uḻakku ney Erivatāka cantirātittavaṟ nittanimantam celuttukaikku Ivvūr sabh Aiyārpakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭu vaicca karuñceynilamāvatu . Ivūr vaṭapiṭākai coḻapāṇṭiyanallūril cūḷāmaṇiviraṉpaṟṟukku nāṉ
kellaiyāvatu tuti Eriyiniṉṟum valameriykku poṉa peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum tāḻi nārāyaṇaṉ paḻampaṟṟukku teṟkkum kiḷellai karuṇākaracoṟaṉpaṟṟukku meṟku ka ṉṉellai Aratāna Alari paṟṟil Itde varkku Ivvūr sabhai yār vaitta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku vaitta nilattukku
vaṭakkum Innāṉ yuḷpaṭa nilam patiṉaiñcu māvukkum vilaidravya mum karadravya mum kuṭuttu Ivvūr śrīpuṇḍa vaṟddha ṉattu Āttirayagotra ttu kaṇṇaṉ ṟṟup paṇikka mārāyamaṅkalattu śā ṇṭilya(ya)go ttirattu kumāraṉpaṭṭaṉ(p) paṇippaṇiyālum tāṅ
kaḷe Iṟai Innila ṟuttu Innilanimantam cantirātittavaṟ cellu(tu)vatākak koṇṭu vaitteṉ śrīpuṇḍa vaṟtdha ṉattu vatsago ttira kūttaṉ comanātaṉeṉ . Ippaṭikku melcāttu I colai Aracu kūttaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai kumāraṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭikku Ivai Ari tevaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai mātavaṉ IṣaThe inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 8.459 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
